title: Paint-Line Purge Sequencing: Co-Locating Full Cleans with Costly Changeovers
strategies: clean before every job in id order: no changeovers, all startups (baseline)
ATSP nearest-neighbour tour over the changeover matrix with reactive cleaning only when the residue cap would overflow (the obvious approach; ignores clean placement)
fix any order, then place cleans by an exact O(N^2) epoch-partition DP so boundaries fall on expensive dark->light transitions
optimize the order against the epoch-DP objective via 2-opt local search seeded by nearest-neighbour tours (co-locate resets with the costliest changeovers)
